hero.title: Price Checker
hero.description: Compare and organize product prices manually with browser-local analysis history.

features.title: A clean manual workspace for price comparisons
features.description: Price Checker V1 keeps price decisions private, lightweight, and dependency-free.

items.title: Capture the product
items.description: Record product name, store, category, current price, optional previous price, and notes.

items.title: Compare savings
items.description: Calculate estimated savings when a previous price is available.

items.title: Manage locally
items.description: Search, filter, edit, duplicate, delete, and clear browser-local analyses.

flow.title: Analyze -> Save -> Review
steps: Create a manual price analysis from the Analyze page.
Save the comparison as browser-local metadata.
Review local insights for prices, stores, and savings.

benefits.title: Make purchase decisions without hidden integrations
benefits.description: V1 supports simple manual comparison instead of live shopping APIs, scraping, or alerts.

items.title: Privacy-first
items.description: Shopping comparisons stay in the current browser.

items.title: Dependency-free
items.description: No shopping API, browser extension, scraping system, or notification service is required.

items.title: Easy review
items.description: Saved analyses can be searched, filtered, edited, duplicated, or removed.

differences.title: Manual comparison instead of price automation
differences.description: Price Checker is intentionally honest about V1: it organizes user-entered prices and does not claim live market accuracy.

items.title: Enter
items.description: Users manually capture product and store details.

items.title: Compare
items.description: The app calculates local savings signals from entered prices.

items.title: Review
items.description: History and insights help users revisit local comparisons.

feel.title: A tidy notebook for prices
feel.description: The app keeps price entries structured without turning into a shopping crawler or alert engine.

items.title: Fast entry
items.description: A shared drawer keeps creation focused.

items.title: Clear savings
items.description: Inline feedback shows whether current price is lower than previous price.

items.title: Organized history
items.description: Filters and search make local comparisons easy to revisit.

audiences.title: Who uses Price Checker
audiences.description: Useful for people making manual purchase comparisons without sharing shopping history.

items.title: Shoppers
items.description: Compare prices before choosing where to buy.

items.title: Households
items.description: Track planned purchase options across stores.

items.title: Budget-conscious users
items.description: Estimate savings from manually entered previous prices.

resourceSection.title: Price Checker essentials
resourceSection.description: A focused V1 for manual browser-local price review.

items.title: Analyze
items.description: Create a product price comparison.

items.title: Analyses
items.description: Search, filter, edit, duplicate, delete, or clear saved comparisons.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Review total products, average price, highest and lowest prices, estimated savings, and most-used store.

groupedSection.title: Compare prices without backend shopping history
groupedSection.description: Move from manual entry to local review and simple insights.

items.name: Product
items.description: Name the product and category.

items.name: Store
items.description: Record where the price was found.

items.name: Savings
items.description: Compare current price against optional previous price.

items.name: Insights
items.description: Summarize local product and store patterns.

technicalSection.title: Browser-local V1 implementation
technicalSection.description: Price Checker follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture while avoiding live shopping integrations.
items: Lazy-loaded frontend module with shared overview, authenticated page state, page header, form drawer, empty state, inline feedback, record action, and stats components.
No shopping API, scraping, backend runtime, price alerts, browser extension, notification service, background job, heavy chart library, or new dependency.

items.question: Does Price Checker fetch live prices?
items.answer: No. V1 is manual and browser-local. Users enter prices themselves.

items.question: Does it scrape shopping websites?
items.answer: No. V1 does not scrape websites or use browser extensions.

items.question: What is saved?
items.answer: Only product comparison metadata: product, store, category, prices, notes, and timestamps.

items.question: Does it send alerts?
items.answer: No. Price alerts and notifications are outside the V1 scope.

finalCta.title: Explore manual browser-local price comparison
finalCta.description: Create a price analysis, compare savings, and keep useful purchase notes in this browser.
